title: jurinea lasiopoda
intro: Jurinea lasiopoda, also known as Lasiothoe or Turkestan milk thistle, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its hepatoprotective and anti-inflammatory effects. Jurinea lasiopoda has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including liver and gallbladder problems, digestive issues, and skin conditions, due to its ability to protect the liver and reduce inflammation. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
